title: 4 Pack MG90 Micro Servo Motor Coreless 9G RC Metal Gear Servo Motor for Futaba JR RC Helicopter Car Boat Robot Arm Plane Arduino
features: Tiny and lightweight with high output power, aluminum metal teeth and metal gears with less noise, this micro servo is perfect for Robot, Helicopter, Airplane or Quadcopter.
Servo can rotate 60 degrees in 0.11sec(4.8V), and work just like the standard kinds but smaller. The servo is consist of aluminum metal teeth, coreless motor, double ball bearin.
The operating voltage of this servo is 4.8V, you can use any servo code, hardware or library to control these servos.
This Micro Servo is a brand- new product, which is updated from SG90 . The Durability, Accuracy and Speed get a preeminent improvement. Temperature Range:0-55℃, dead band setting:5 microseconds.
The package included 4pcs Micro servo, each come with one motor, a pack of screws and servo arms. Please feel free to contact us if you have any question in use, we would serve you sincerely.
